name: the-things-network
title: The Things Stack — JSON Structure Overview
description: Top-level entity model exposed by The Things Stack v3 APIs.

entities.name: User
entities.summary: Account principal; owns applications, gateways, organizations, API keys, sessions.

entities.name: Organization
entities.summary: Multi-user tenant scope; collaborator of applications, gateways, and clients.

entities.name: Application
entities.summary: Owns end devices, webhooks, pub/sub integrations, payload formatters, and storage.

entities.name: EndDevice
entities.summary: LoRaWAN device record split across AS, NS, JS for application metadata, MAC state, and session keys.

entities.name: Gateway
entities.summary: LoRa packet forwarder endpoint; reports status, uplinks, and downlinks.

entities.name: ApplicationWebhook
entities.summary: HTTP delivery target with per-message-kind path mapping.

entities.name: ApplicationPubSub
entities.summary: NATS / MQTT / AWS / Azure pub-sub integration.

entities.name: APIKey
entities.summary: Token-based credential; carries a set of rights (RIGHT_* enum).

entities.name: OAuthClient
entities.summary: OAuth 2.0 client registration; supports authorization-code, refresh tokens, PKCE.

entities.name: Event
entities.summary: Real-time event published by IS/AS/NS/GS/JS for any entity change or message lifecycle.

entities.name: FrequencyPlan
entities.summary: LoRaWAN regional parameter selection (EU_863_870, US_902_928, etc.).
